title: M1 — Strategy-card contract + dispatch seam
source: hackathon-pm M0 bootstrap 2026-05-28; roadmap in plan eres-un-product-manager-bubbly-floyd.md
why: The strategy-card JSON is the single research<->execution seam; without it execution would recompute research decisions and drift. Extracting evaluate_primary/compose_features makes live decisions identical to backtest decisions (the parity guarantee depends on it).
value_rationale: Critical path to live paper-trading for the AI Engine Quantitative Hack; H = directly gates competition participation.
scope: contracts/ package: schema.json + card.py (StrategyCard dataclasses, load/validate/dump, card_from_deployment_block)
pipeline/primary_dispatch.py: extract evaluate_primary() from script-private _select_primary/_select_primary_signal; scripts delegate
pipeline/feature_compose.py: extract compose_features() from run_multi_h4._build_features_for_asset; windowed-window last-row == full-series test

history.reason: chore(coordination): mark M0 done; next action M1 (B0072)

Superseded by the no-alpha survival-book pivot. The strategy-card contract + primary/meta dispatch seam exists to route META-LABELING decisions live; the survival book uses NO primaries/meta/cards -- its research<->live seam is compute_survival_target (SSOT shared by backtest+live), which already guarantees parity (B0077). The card machinery would only matter if a meta-labeling card were deployed, and edge search is exhausted (9 nulls). Re-open only if a meta strategy is ever blessed.
@ chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
chore(backlog): reconcile M1-M7 execution epic with the survival-book reality
